name: cw_e2eautomation-framwork
description: Hybrid Automation Framework with Playwright and TypeScript

scripts.allure:generate: cross-env JAVA_HOME="C:\Program Files\Zulu\zulu-21" allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report
scripts.allure:open: cross-env JAVA_HOME="C:\Program Files\Zulu\zulu-21" allure open allure-report
scripts.allure:serve: cross-env JAVA_HOME="C:\Program Files\Zulu\zulu-21" allure serve allure-results
